Hardware Component File

N_PZ1A_RADAR_FD_VC_20201009

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference N_PZ1A_RADAR_FD_VC_20201009_20201021T111112.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 2000000
Send ID 723
Receive ID 735
Functional Addr 2B
Functional Name RADAR

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[

    "diagversion": "112",
    "supplier": "1111111111",
    "soft": "JNEQ",
    "version": "4VM9"
  }
